name: Chocolate and Coconut Macaroons
recipeInstructions: Melt together in the top of a double boiler, over hot water, the unsweetened chocolate and sweet baking chocolate. Stir until smooth; remove from heat and cool. Beat the egg whites with a rotary beater until stiff. Gradually beat in sugar. Add the cooled chocolate mixture and continue beating until well mixed. Fold in flaked coconut. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto well-buttered baking sheets, making about 30 cookies. Bake in a preheated oven at 325 degrees Fahrenheit until stiff on the outside but still slightly soft inside, about 16 minutes. Remove from oven and loosen with a spatula. Remove from pan when cookies are completely cooled.
